tweets.full_text:
Agents got smarter with the identity and payment rails to back it up. Consumer products shipped across trading terminals to privacy tools. Institutions continued expanding onchain with the capital to match. 

Big week in the ecosystem:

📰 Headline News

- Solana flipped Ethereum in total RWA holders for the first time per @RWA_xyz

- @Backpack announced onchain IPO share allocations powered by @SuperstateInc

- @solana unveiled Agent Registry via @Quantu_AI for verifiable AI agent identity

- @crossmint partnered with @WesternUnion to launch the USDPT stablecoin

📰 Launches

- @RaenestApp added Solana support for USDT and USDC deposits

- @MetaDAOProject rolled out @futarddotio for community-direct fundraising

- @solflare introduced PAL as a native privacy layer for Private Send

- @perena and Plume’s @NestCredit opened a dedicated Solana RWA vault

- @DeFiCarrot debuted CRT, aggregated yield token with protected leverage looping

- @MeteoraAG released Dynamic Terminal with advanced LP tools

- @sphere_labs shipped Offloader Wallets for programmatic stablecoin-to-fiat conversion

- @BungeeExchange debuted Bungee Incognito on Solana

- StableHacks unveiled stablecoin hackathon with $200K+ in prizes

- @TryNoahAI integrated @dflow smart routing into OpenClaw

- @Quicknode open-sourced its x402 npm package for agentic USDC payments

- @ValeoProtocol introduced Valeo SPL Pay to enable API monetization

- @BlockRunAI went live with a unified API for 30+ AI models

- @KairosTradeX shipped a trading terminal for prediction markets

- @ranger_finance announced Build-A-Bear Hackathon with $1M vault TVL seed funding

- @agentmail empowered AI agents to create email inboxes via @x402

- @8004_scan added Solana support for ERC-8004 agent registration

- @dopplerprotocol architected a native Solana rebuild of its token launch protocol

- @blastgit shipped a platform to tokenize and open-source software projects

- @zauthx402 launched Vector for agentic web app security auditing

- @CyreneAI partnered with @WLTHxyz to bring tokenized pre-IPO access to Solana

📰 Milestones

- @solana in Feb recorded $650B stablecoin volume (2X+ previous ATH) across 9.4M holders

- @Bitwise’s BSOL weekly inflows hit $30M+

- @RaiseNetwork_ surpassed $20M in gift card volume and 156K wallets

If you enjoyed this week’s newsletter, please share it with an RT.

This week's cover art by @fakisha08

tweets.full_text:
I’m already noticing that many of you are slowly leaving the space or engaging less.

If you are reading this, thank you for staying here and choosing to believe.

Let me say something. The only reason this account has grown so much is because I never left. My conviction never fluctuated.

I have tweeted every single day for more than 5 years. I witnessed Solana at all prices.

I experienced every Solana bear market. I bought SOL throughout the $8-$20 range.

I kept spreading love during FTX and all the shitty Solana moments.

I kept tweeting about Solana every time people assumed Solana was dead.

I witnessed every up and every down of this network and this unbelievable community.

If tomorrow people say Solana died for the 26237th time, I will still be here.

If Solana is dead, I’ll witness its reincarnation. If Solana lives, I’ll watch it die and rise again, over and over again.

This is why I made it. This is why many didn’t. You either get it or you don’t.

I choose to make an impact in Solana and witness my seeds grow into fruits.

I am the change I want to see. I am the motivation, the love, and the compassion others lack. I choose this every day.

I am the discipline and the effort that turns belief into reality.

I swear to God that if you quit now, you will only repeat this process infinitely till you deeply understand it and awaken.

Now is the time to stay. Now is the time to believe. Now is the time to double down and build Solana together.

tweets.full_text:
The basic argument for @Solana:

- you can build a real scale business on chain, last month apps earned 4x more than the network itself 

- apps own the users, there’s no centralized distribution point

- therefore, the most talented & ambitious startup founders eventually find themselves building on Solana because the ceiling for them is as high as possible

- this leads to intense competition to win on every app vector or infra piece, you see this materialize in fights over trading and block building and pAMMs for example 

- the net of intense competition is a much faster half life on product iteration & invention, eg the apps get better much faster

- users have better experiences on Solana as a result, which fuels network retention

tweets.full_text:
An unexpected meeting with an old friend {@forotney} led to @NOMADZxyz & @perena's partnership.

While exploring Solana Breakpoint in Abu Dhabi organized by @SolanaEvents, I came across the Perena booth. It immediately caught my attention because of the great merch they had on display.

Perena allows users to hold stablecoins in a way that automatically generates yield, without staking, lockups, or manual strategy management.

Behind the booth, I unexpectedly met my old friend, Pasha. He told me more about Perena and their NFT community @Perenimals, and also introduced me to @shizudio.

During the conversation, I shared more about Nomadz and how we help Web3 travelers. I also mentioned that we partnered up with Solana communities such as @MadLads, @MonkeDAO, @islanddao, and others.

As the conversation continued, we came up with the idea of onboarding the Perenimals community to Nomadz.

That spontaneous meeting turned into something valuable for nearly 500 NFT holders.

• 200 XP 
• 20% XP boost 
• extra 500 XP for exclusive Perena quest 

The insight from it: You never know when or from whom a great opportunity might appear.

If you are a Perenimals holder, go to Nomadz and verify your NFT to unlock the benefits we prepared for the community.

tweets.full_text:
Weekly Update – @NOMADZxyz | Week 11 [2026] Let's go!

1. TL;DR

Quick wins:
1. Improved gamification and launched 2nd-level referral for communities (5% USDC + 5% XP per booking)
2. Shipped release #9 to @solanamobile dApp Store + passed KYB 
3. Nomadz 100 Cohort 1, Week 2: 28 creators, 35+ user-generated posts live
4. Onboarded @Perenimals community (500+ NFT holders) via Matrica Connect integration
5. Crossed 16.5K registered users and 19.6K followers on X 
6. Set up the node on @monad testnet + submitted validator application

What's next:
1. Platform: Launch the Earth interface for events, including side events, discount codes, and search improvements
2. Mobile: Ship release #10 with AI agent integration + referral program
3. Community campaign with @SolanaSensei + email blast to 16.5K users

2. Highlights

Product - Platform
1. Launched 2nd-level referral for communities: earn 5% in USDC and 5 XP from every booking your community drives. 
2. Integrated a new travel partner (Agoda) with more stays and discounts.
3. Added the first community with Matrica Connect implementation live with @Perena and built a unique quests section. 
4. Added new upcoming events for Q2 2026.
5. Fixed bugs, improved, and polished the referral dashboard based on early user feedback.

Product - Mobile
1. Shipped release #9 of the Solana Mobile dApp store: improved book-nearby flow, added events calendar, improved search.
2. Release #10 in testing: AI agent integration, new badges + referral program.

Growth
1. Nomadz 100 Cohort 1, Week 2 live - 28 creators generated 40+ posts.
2. Did a launch campaign with Perena and Perenimals. 
3. Partnered with 3 more event organizers for Q2.
4. Wrote and shipped the February monthly report on X.
5. Filled out our profile on DeltaV and submitted the Week 10 report.
6. Interviewed with @pareen and @alexgedevani for @nitrodotacc accelerator - waiting for feedback.
7. Set up a node on the Monad testnet and submitted the validator application form.

3. Lowlights
1. We cannot fly out from Dubai to Georgia to host the Solana Snowcamp that we planned due to the war in the Middle East.
2. Technical issues with verification and the onboarding flow for a new community launch. Identified and resolved quickly - now live.

4. Core Metrics
1. Total Users: 16,567 (↑ from 16,312 last week)
2. Active Users (week): 869
3. New Users (week): 202
4. DAU: 124 on average 
5. Transactions on Solana (week): 669
6. 17 new bookings (6 users booked second or third time)
7. X Followers (@NOMADZxyz): 19,642 (↑ +182)
8. Community Posts: 41 (↑ from 30 last week)

5. This Week's Focus
→ Launch Earth interface - conferences, side events, search improvements, discount codes for users 
→ Send monthly email campaign to 16.5K registered users 
→ Run SolanaSensei community campaign 
→ Submit release #10 to Solana dApp Store (AI agent integration, referral, and new badges) 

6. Asks
1. Know event organizers in crypto/Web3 who'd want discounted stays for their attendees?
2. Looking for travelers willing to test our AI agent on mobile this week - DM me
3. Looking for content creators to join Cohort 2 of Nomadz 100 - apply or refer someone

7. Shoutouts
Big thanks to our advisor @TimHaldorsson for the sharp ideas and valuable intros this week. 
@Ayde_Sol_Jedi, thanks for the intro to the Canton team.
And to the 28 Nomadz 100 creators showing up and building in public, you're the Nomadz.

Weekly Update – @NOMADZxyz | Week 11 [2026] Let's go!

1. TL;DR

Quick wins:
1. Improved gamification and launched 2nd-level referral for communities (5% USDC + 5% XP per booking)
2. Shipped release #9 to @solanamobile dApp Store + passed KYB 
3. Nomadz 100 Cohort 1, Week 2: 28 creators, 35+ user-generated posts live
4. Onboarded @Perenimals community (500+ NFT holders) via Matrica Connect integration
5. Crossed 16.5K registered users and 19.6K followers on X 
6. Set up the node on @monad testnet + submitted validator application

What's next:
1. Platform: Launch the Earth interface for events, including side events, discount codes, and search improvements
2. Mobile: Ship release #10 with AI agent integration + referral program
3. Community campaign with @SolanaSensei + email blast to 16.5K users

2. Highlights

Product - Platform
1. Launched 2nd-level referral for communities: earn 5% in USDC and 5 XP from every booking your community drives. 
2. Integrated a new travel partner (Agoda) with more stays and discounts.
3. Added the first community with Matrica Connect implementation live with @Perena and built a unique quests section. 
4. Added new upcoming events for Q2 2026.
5. Fixed bugs, improved, and polished the referral dashboard based on early user feedback.

Product - Mobile
1. Shipped release #9 of the Solana Mobile dApp store: improved book-nearby flow, added events calendar, improved search.
2. Release #10 in testing: AI agent integration, new badges + referral program.

Growth
1. Nomadz 100 Cohort 1, Week 2 live - 28 creators generated 40+ posts.
2. Did a launch campaign with Perena and Perenimals. 
3. Partnered with 3 more event organizers for Q2.
4. Wrote and shipped the February monthly report on X.
5. Filled out our profile on DeltaV and submitted the Week 10 report.
6. Interviewed with @pareen and @alexgedevani for @nitrodotacc accelerator - waiting for feedback.
7. Set up a node on the Monad testnet and submitted the validator application form.

3. Lowlights
1. We cannot fly out from Dubai to Georgia to host the Solana Snowcamp that we planned due to the war in the Middle East.
2. Technical issues with verification and the onboarding flow for a new community launch. Identified and resolved quickly - now live.

4. Core Metrics
1. Total Users: 16,567 (↑ from 16,312 last week)
2. Active Users (week): 869
3. New Users (week): 202
4. DAU: 124 on average 
5. Transactions on Solana (week): 669
6. 17 new bookings (6 users booked second or third time)
7. X Followers (@NOMADZxyz): 19,642 (↑ +182)
8. Community Posts: 41 (↑ from 30 last week)

5. This Week's Focus
→ Launch Earth interface - conferences, side events, search improvements, discount codes for users 
→ Send monthly email campaign to 16.5K registered users 
→ Run SolanaSensei community campaign 
→ Submit release #10 to Solana dApp Store (AI agent integration, referral, and new badges) 

6. Asks
1. Know event organizers in crypto/Web3 who'd want discounted stays for their attendees?
2. Looking for travelers willing to test our AI agent on mobile this week - DM me
3. Looking for content creators to join Cohort 2 of Nomadz 100 - apply or refer someone

7. Shoutouts
Big thanks to our advisor @TimHaldorsson for the sharp ideas and valuable intros this week. 
@Ayde_Sol_Jedi, thanks for the intro to the Canton team.
And to the 28 Nomadz 100 creators showing up and building in public, you're the Nomadz.
